hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && out=$(uv run --offline ruff check --fix 2>&1 | head -30); [ -n "$out" ] && jq -nc --arg ctx "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: $ctx}}' || true

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && out=$(uv run --offline pytest --no-cov -q 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then jq -nc --arg ctx "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "Stop", additionalContext: ("Tests are failing at turn end:\n" + $ctx)}}'; fi
